text:
NEAR EAST - AFRICA

4. Mossadeq reportedly orders arrest of antigovernment mullahs:

Comment: Since last May, Kashani has reportedly been trying to organize religious opposition to the prime minister. The police also claimed evidence that Kashani supported the group that murdered the former pro-Mossadeq police chief Afshartus. If Mossadeq moves against religious leaders, he will risk the development of widespread and serious popular antagonism
